name: Build - Release (X.0.0)

on:
  workflow_dispatch:
    branches-ignore:
      - main

jobs:
  bump-and-pr:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    permissions:
      contents: write
      pull-requests: write

    steps:
      - name: Check out repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Bump major version in gradle.properties
        run: |
          CURRENT=$(grep '^mod_version=' gradle.properties | cut -d'=' -f2 | tr -d '[:space:]')
          MAJOR=$(echo $CURRENT | cut -d'.' -f1)
          NEW_MAJOR=$((MAJOR + 1))
          NEW_VERSION="${NEW_MAJOR}.0.0"
          sed -i "s/^mod_version=.*/mod_version=${NEW_VERSION}/" gradle.properties
          echo "MOD_VERSION=$NEW_VERSION" >> $GITHUB_ENV
          echo "Bumped $CURRENT -> $NEW_VERSION"

      - name: Commit version bump to branch
        run: |
          git config user.name "github-actions[bot]"
          git config user.email "github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com"
          git add gradle.properties
          git commit -m "Release v${{ env.MOD_VERSION }}"
          git push

      - name: Open pull request to main
        env:
          GH_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
        run: |
          gh pr create \
            --title "Release v${{ env.MOD_VERSION }}" \
            --body "Automated release version bump to v${{ env.MOD_VERSION }}. Review and merge to trigger release build." \
            --base main \
            --head ${{ github.ref_name }}
